CustomField.label: Trigger Layer
CustomField.description: The nepa_detected_protection_layer__c record that caused this Work Order to be created. Links the field survey task back to the specific federal protection layer that triggered it. Populated by NEPA_Work_Order_Generator. Cleared (SetNull) if the detected layer record is deleted.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The detected federal protection layer (e.g., NWI Wetlands) that triggered creation of this Work Order.
